missingScenarioTitles: Verify product list is displayed on landing page for a guest user
Verify each product displays a product name in the list
Verify each product displays an image on the landing page
Verify each product displays a price on the landing page
Verify landing page loads product list within acceptable response time
Verify empty state message is shown when no products are available
Verify product list is displayed correctly on desktop screen size
Verify product list is displayed correctly on tablet screen size

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify product list is displayed on landing page for a guest user
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Stable UI element presence check; easily verifiable with Playwright by asserting product list container is visible and contains at least one item

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify each product displays a product name in the list
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Text content assertions per product card can be reliably done in Playwright by iterating over product list items and checking innerText

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify each product displays an image on the landing page
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright can evaluate image naturalWidth > 0 and src attribute presence to confirm images are loaded correctly

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify each product displays a price on the landing page
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright can use regex or text assertions to verify price format per product card

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify landing page loads product list within acceptable response time
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright supports performance timing APIs and can measure time-to-visible for specific elements

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify empty state message is shown when no products are available
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright can assert visibility of empty state element when mock API returns an empty product array

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify product list is displayed correctly on desktop screen size
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright supports viewport configuration and visual assertions for layout verification at specific resolutions

selectedAutomatableTests.title: Verify product list is displayed correctly on tablet screen size
selectedAutomatableTests.reason: Playwright can emulate tablet viewports and run the same product list assertions at different screen sizes
